name: Key Lime Pie from Fred Goslin
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Real Lime lime juice from concentrate
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat the egg yolks with the sweetened condensed milk, lime juice, and green food coloring until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared pastry shell.
4. Bake in the preheated oven for 30 minutes or until set.
5. Allow to cool completely before removing from the oven.
6. Chill thoroughly.
7. Top with Coolwhip and garnish as desired.
